response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio is a humorous voice-over skit in English and does not contain the songs mentioned in the reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the song lyrics from the reference JSON as they do not match the video content; performed 100% manual transcription and translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed tightly to the voice actors' dramatic and fast-paced delivery to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Raora, what are you doing? You're not even driving!

subtitles.original: Gigi Murin, you know I hate cucumbers!
subtitles.english: Gigi Murin, you know I hate cucumbers!

subtitles.original: What? You...

subtitles.original: Gigi Murin, you know I hate cucumbers!
subtitles.english: Gigi Murin, you know I hate cucumbers!

subtitles.english: Why do you have cucumbers right now?!

subtitles.original: Eww, get out of here!
subtitles.english: Eww, get out of here!

subtitles.english: Don't you freaking hate me? You hate me!

subtitles.english: So you hate me? So you hate me? Just say it!

subtitles.english: Tell me you freaking hate me! You hate me!

subtitles.english: You know how I feel when you tell me that you bring cucumbers, and I hate cucumbers!
